% paper-en-ieee.tex — IEEE-style paper template (article fallback).
%
% NOTE: IEEEtran.cls (TeX Live: texlive-publishers) is not installed in this
% environment. We fall back to a single-column article layout that preserves
% Pandoc compatibility; replace the documentclass with `IEEEtran` and restore
% the \IEEEauthorblock* commands once the package is available.
\documentclass[10pt,a4paper]{article}
\usepackage[a4paper,margin=2.0cm]{geometry}

% --- Pandoc-compatibility shims -----------------------------------------
\providecommand{\tightlist}{\setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}\setlength{\parskip}{0pt}}
\providecommand{\passthrough}[1]{#1}
\providecommand{\pandocbounded}[1]{#1}
% Stubs for IEEEtran-specific macros; harmless on article class.
\providecommand{\IEEEauthorblockN}[1]{#1}
\providecommand{\IEEEauthorblockA}[1]{\\\small\textit{#1}}

\usepackage{fontspec}
\setmainfont{DejaVu Serif}
\setmonofont{DejaVu Sans Mono}
\usepackage{polyglossia}
\setdefaultlanguage{english}

\usepackage{cite}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{calc}
\usepackage{etoolbox}
\usepackage{fancyvrb}
\usepackage{framed}
\usepackage{microtype}
\usepackage{listings}
\lstset{
  basicstyle=\ttfamily\footnotesize,
  breaklines=true,
  columns=fullflexible,
  keepspaces=true,
  showstringspaces=false,
  frame=single,
  framerule=0.3pt,
}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{url}
\usepackage[hidelinks]{hyperref}

$for(header-includes)$
$header-includes$
$endfor$

\title{$title$}

\author{$for(author)$$author$$sep$ \and $endfor$\\\\\small\textit{TODO: Affiliation, City, Country (corresponding@example.org)}}

\begin{document}
\maketitle

\begin{abstract}
$if(abstract)$$abstract$$else$TODO: abstract.$endif$
\end{abstract}

\noindent\textbf{Index Terms:}
$if(keywords)$$for(keywords)$$keywords$$sep$, $endfor$$else$LLM, coding assistant, multi-tenant$endif$\par
\vspace{0.5em}

$body$

% IEEEtran.bst not installed; fall back to plain.
\bibliographystyle{plain}
$if(bibliography)$
\bibliography{$for(bibliography)$$bibliography$$sep$,$endfor$}
$else$
% TODO(placeholder): point to docs/paper-en/references.bib once authored.
$endif$

\end{document}
